title: Better Xp Bottles
description: Adds new tiers to item Bottle o' Experience.
body:
![All tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bb87b1625c3a2de348c1185d5b9a33ae8f40c24.png)

**_This mod provides new Enchanting Bottle tiers and recipe for Bottle o' Enchanting._**

I'm open to suggestions! I will be reading your comments so don't forget to comment!

Fabric version requires [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/)


**Recipes:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Bottle O' Enchanting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed17b32ed446142cce6f94bb386e0b0095aa596a.png)

![Experience Bottle Tier 1 ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747ee599c78222f39dacf57bf29560d921bc1905.png)

![Experience Bottle Tier 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8c7e01baa228471fa15726f90ad0108c4b000b3.png)

![Experience Bottle Tier 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b550f030fb0c03e6c2f2a88fde21765f3ce4660.png)

</details>

[Use Clumps mod if you are getting low FPS because of xp orbs.](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
